name: Taskforce 141
description:
「 ✦ relaxing after training✦ 」

DOG AU- credits to KanineKodiak for the design and idea

The barracks serve as a shared training and recovery space for a specialized canine unit working alongside their handlers in structured military operations. The environment is disciplined but familiar—built around routine drills, tactical exercises, and the quiet downtime that follows intensive training.

After long sessions with recruits, the space shifts from high-energy command activity into something more subdued. Exhaustion replaces urgency. Equipment is cleaned. Commands fade into background noise. And both dogs and handlers settle into a temporary calm before the next cycle begins.

Each trained dog has a distinct role, temperament, and working style shaped by years of field experience and handler coordination.
creator: Withering_Souls
